aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with structured content and schema markup but lacks reviews and detailed localized content.
quick_wins: Generate and display customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Expand content to include detailed service descriptions and location-specific keywords.
Implement a blog or resource section to target long-tail keywords and establish authority.

gbp_analysis.summary: The website has local service pages and contact information but lacks a comprehensive Google Business Profile (GBP) and customer reviews.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information on its website but lacks citations on external directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on external platforms.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area.
No Review schema to display customer testimonials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers seeking social proof
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and displaying reviews prominently on the website
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and establishing a strong presence on social media and local directories

page_title: Pasadena HVAC Services | Air Comfort Experts
